description: A hatchery manager needs to ensure the incubators are maintaining the correct temperature and humidity for optimal chick hatching.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the real-time temperature and humidity data from all incubators.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the current environmental data.

nodes.task_description: Compare the current conditions to the ideal incubation profile for the specific age of the eggs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent flags one incubator where the humidity is too low.

nodes.task_description: Automatically adjust the humidity setting on the flagged incubator and send a notification to the manager.

expected_outcome.value: Agent corrects the setting and informs the manager.
